description: Chakipee compact heavy duty premium umbrella with automatic technology and double vented canopy design We think we have designed the perfect umbrella for those who don't want to miss out on the comfort of a large size umbrella. Compact,portable,handy and small Highest quality. Thanks to the special waterproof and extremely tightly woven 210T (conventional umbrellas only use 190T polyester), the sturdy umbrella is extremely robust, making it also ideal for storms and strong winds. Automatic opening and closing. With just a press of the trigger, the umbrella opens securely and tightens up. With a further press it closes again and only needs to be easily pushed together. Double vented canopy design. Our wind proof umbrella is engineered with double canopy and strong fiberglass and metal shaft that can stand strong against powerful winds, keeping you dry and protected in any weather. When folded, it is a mini umbrella for purse and only 31cm/12.2inch long. When opened, it is a conventional big umbrella and offers a sufficient XXL span for up to two people with an arc diameter of about 120cm/47inch. Details: Shade area: 120cm/47 inch Opening diameter: 102 cm/40 inch Weight: approx: 417g/0.92lb Ribs: 9 Centre bar: Made of iron alloy. Length when stored: 31 cm/12.2 inch Rib: fiberglass Handle: EVA Foam and ABS ergonomic Surface material: 210T polyester fiber
